PrivacyPolicyIntro: This policy has been prepared to help you understand the nature of the data we collect from you when you visit our website and how we handle this personal information.
PrivacyPolicy_Browsing_Text: This website is not designed to collect your personal information from your computer while browsing. Any data used will only be the information you provide voluntarily and knowingly.
PrivacyPolicy_IP_Text: Whenever you visit any website, including this one, the hosting server logs your IP address, the date and time of your visit, the type of browser you use, and the URL of any website that referred you to this site.
PrivacyPolicy_Surveys_Text: Online surveys we conduct allow us to collect specific data such as your opinions and feelings about our website. Your responses are highly valuable and appreciated, as they help us improve our website. You are free to provide your name and any other optional information.
PrivacyPolicy_Links_Text: Our website may contain links to other websites or advertisements from third-party sites. We are not responsible for the data collection methods used by those websites. You can review the privacy policies and content of any websites accessed through links on our site.

Terms_Modification: Any modification to these terms becomes effective immediately upon announcement, unless stated otherwise. Your continued use of the website after any modification is announced constitutes full acceptance of that modification.

VELVET_OUD_OVERVIEW: Velvet Oud is an opulent oriental fragrance crafted for those who appreciate the depth and warmth of premium agarwood. The scent opens with a whisper of saffron before settling into a rich oud heart layered with velvety rose petals and cedarwood. The base of amber and white musk lingers on the skin for hours.
SILK_ROUGE_OVERVIEW: Silk Rouge redefines the matte lip experience. Enriched with vitamin E and a hydrating complex, this formula delivers bold colour without drying out your lips. The innovative polymer system locks pigment in place for up to 12 hours.
ROSE_NOIR_OVERVIEW: Rose Noir is a captivating floral-woody fragrance that balances femininity with depth. Centred around a heart of Bulgarian rose, the scent is grounded by dark vetiver and smoked musk.
GLOW_SERUM_OVERVIEW: Glow Serum Foundation merges skincare with makeup in a single step. Infused with hyaluronic acid, it plumps and hydrates while offering buildable coverage. The SPF 30 formula shields against UV damage.
GOLD_OUD_OVERVIEW: Gold Oud Intense is our most luxurious creation. Persian saffron sparkles at the top, giving way to a majestic oud core enriched with Indian sandalwood. The dry-down reveals creamy Madagascar vanilla and tonka bean.
VELVET_EYE_OVERVIEW: The Velvet Eye Palette houses 12 curated shades spanning matte neutrals, shimmering nudes, and bold jewel tones. Cruelty-free and designed for all skin tones.
AQUA_BLANCHE_OVERVIEW: Aqua Blanche captures the sensation of a coastal morning. Marine accord and bergamot open with freshness, transitioning into jasmine petals and muguet. Cedarwood and white musk form a clean lingering base.
HYDRA_GLOW_OVERVIEW: Hydra Glow is a next-generation moisturiser. A triple ceramide complex restores the skin barrier, while 10% niacinamide evens tone. Organic aloe vera soothes and calms for a plump, dewy finish.
TitleManger: At Ahlame, we believe that beauty is not a luxury — it is every woman's right. We set out with a clear vision: to become the most trusted destination in Saudi Arabia for everything related to beauty and skincare. Since our founding, we have carefully curated the finest perfumes, makeup, and cosmetic products, delivering uncompromising quality at prices that suit every woman. We do not simply sell products; we craft a unique experience that empowers every woman to feel confident and truly beautiful. Our vision is for Ahlame to be a symbol of elegance and quality in every home across the Gulf.
